title: sapphire_mod
description: A mod that adds a lot of things. It adds sapphire armor, tools and a new kind of foods and a new type of villager. The sapphire armor and tools ads custom effects.
body:
Sapphire mod
So why should you use the mod. Well it includes new things for both pve and pvp. 
It adds a new ore called the sapphire ore. You get it by trading with the new villager. He is called the sound master. He use the new sound block i added as toolbench. You can use the sapphire to craft new armor and tools. I added a special thing to the sword and armor. The armor will give you night vision if you have the full set on while the sword has leviation on it. The leviation effect makes the mobs fly when you hit them. You can also trim the sapphire armor in the same bench as where you trim the netherite armor. 

But tools and armors is not everything. I have also added a new tool called the metal detector. You can right click on any block with it and it will say the cordinates of the ore in the chat.

Foods
I have added two new food items called tomatoes and strawberrys. The strawberry have a special effect that makes you faster while the tomatoes has an effect that makes you jump higher. You can get the seeds from the farmer. 

There is also a new fuel item you can use and its a pine one. You get it by killing zombies or from grass.

Summary
This is a sapphire mod that includes new metals, weapons, armores and foods.
It also adds new recipes. It also adds new cool extra things like night vision to the armore and leviation to the sword. I have also added a new villager that is called sound master.
